app.uniswap.orgDEX · Multi-chain

AI Plain-English Site ExplainerUniswap is one of the largest decentralized exchanges on Ethereum, letting you swap tokens directly from your wallet without intermediaries.
Technical Actions Requested

The page is offering token swaps. Connecting your wallet allows the site to read balances and request swap signatures — it cannot move funds without your approval.
